description: Browser fingerprinting, device identification, cross-device tracking

TDID_v2.description: The Trade Desk UID2 cookie for cookieless identity resolution using hashed email addresses

_1p_uid.description: 1plusX first-party data platform cookie for predictive audience identity resolution without cookies

_augur_uid.description: Augur AI-powered device fingerprinting cookie for linking anonymous devices to real identities across devices and sessions

_cc_id.description: Lotame cross-device cookie collecting browser and device signals for deterministic identity matching

_cid_yahoo.description: Yahoo ConnectID cookie for deterministic identity matching using hashed email addresses from 225M+ Yahoo Mail users

_exp_did.description: Credit bureau digital identity cookie — uses credit file data on 245M+ US consumers for digital advertising and identity resolution

_fabrick_id.description: Neustar Fabrick identity resolution cookie linking online identifiers to offline consumer data for cross-device targeting

_iidt.description: FingerprintJS device identity cookie for cross-session browser fingerprint persistence

_netid_*.description: European single sign-on identity cookie enabling cross-site tracking across participating European media properties

_onetag_uid.description: OneTag publisher monetization identity cookie for audience identification in programmatic advertising

_publir_*.description: Publir publisher monetization identity cookie for ad stack optimization and visitor identification

_retargetly_id.description: Retargetly Latin American data management platform cookie for audience profiling and identity resolution

_rid_lramp.description: LiveRamp RampID cookie — converts PII into a deterministic identifier used across 500+ ad platforms for persistent cross-device targeting

_rk_wallet.description: RainbowKit wallet detection cookie — records which crypto wallets users have installed, creating a financial technology fingerprint

_thr_id.description: Throtle deterministic identity cookie — matches offline PII to online identifiers for persistent cross-device identity graphs

_tu_id.description: Credit bureau identity cookie — links consumer credit file data with online identifiers for cross-device identity resolution

_vid_t.description: FingerprintJS visitor identifier timestamp for fingerprint freshness validation

_w3m_*.description: Web3Modal wallet connection cookie — records which cryptocurrency wallets are installed and connected, fingerprinting the user's crypto ecosystem

adform_cid.description: Adform client identifier cookie for cross-device tracking and programmatic advertising identity resolution

adnxs_uid.description: Microsoft Xandr (AppNexus) identity cookie for cross-publisher user identification in programmatic marketplace

adotmob_*.description: Adot mobile identity cookie for cross-device tracking using device fingerprint and location signals

attribution-reporting-eligible.description: Chrome Attribution Reporting trigger — enables cross-site ad conversion measurement by registering attribution sources and triggers in the browser

bk_*.description: Oracle BlueKai data management platform cookie for cross-device audience profiling and targeting

bn_device_id.description: Binance device fingerprint cookie for exchange security and anti-fraud device recognition

browsing-topics.description: Chrome Topics API header — exposes visitor interest categories derived from recent browsing history to sites and ad tech vendors via the Sec-Browsing-Topics header

cb_device_id.description: Coinbase device identifier cookie for fraud prevention and cross-device account security fingerprinting

connectId.description: Yahoo ConnectID persistent identifier for cross-site identity matching using hashed email addresses

criteo_fpc.description: Criteo first-party cookie enabling persistent identity for retargeting when third-party cookies are blocked

euid.description: The Trade Desk EUID cookie — European version of UID2 for GDPR-compliant deterministic identity using hashed email

euid_*.description: European Unified ID cookie — same email-to-ad-ID system as UID 2.0 but marketed as GDPR-compliant persistent cross-site tracking

floc_*.description: Federated Learning of Cohorts cookie — deprecated Google experiment that grouped users into behavioral cohorts for ad targeting. Cookies may persist from earlier Chrome versions.

fpjs_*.description: FingerprintJS browser fingerprinting cookie for highly persistent device identification

gpp_sid.description: IAB GPP section ID cookie identifying which privacy regulation sections apply to the current user

gpp_v.description: IAB GPP version cookie tracking consent framework version for multi-jurisdiction consent management

hadronId_*.description: Audigent Hadron real-time identity enrichment cookie combining device signals with contextual data for cookieless targeting

id5.description: ID5 universal identifier cookie for cross-publisher identity resolution in programmatic advertising

id5_sync.description: ID5 cookie sync timestamp for maintaining identity graph freshness across ad tech partners

idx.description: Merkle identity resolution cookie linking online behavior to offline consumer data for people-based targeting

intent_iq_*.description: IntentIQ probabilistic identity resolution cookie using device signals to match visitors across publishers without login data

iponweb_uid.description: BidSwitch identity resolution cookie synchronizing user IDs across 300+ ad tech platforms

iri_*.description: IRI/Circana purchase analytics cookie linking retail purchase data to online identifiers for CPG ad targeting

liveramp_ats.description: LiveRamp Authenticated Traffic Solution cookie for deterministic cross-site identity resolution

lotame_*.description: Lotame DMP cookie for Panorama ID people-based identity resolution across devices

novatiq_*.description: Novatiq telecom-grade identity cookie using carrier network data for cookieless user identification

optable_id.description: Optable privacy-first data collaboration identity cookie for encrypted audience matching

panoramaId_*.description: Lotame Panorama ID cookie for people-based identity resolution without third-party cookies

pbjs_unifiedid.description: Prebid.js unified identifier module cookie for cross-platform audience matching in header bidding

permutive_*.description: Permutive edge-based data management platform cookie for first-party audience segmentation without third-party cookies

ps_interest_group_*.description: Privacy Sandbox interest group cookie storing retargeting audience membership for on-device ad auction participation

rtbh_uid.description: RTB House deep learning retargeting identifier using AI-powered device fingerprinting for personalized ad delivery

seedtag_*.description: Seedtag contextual advertising cookie combining content analysis with device signals for cookieless targeting

sharedid.description: Prebid SharedID first-party cookie providing a shared user identifier across header bidding demand partners

tapad_*.description: Tapad cross-device identity graph cookie linking devices to a single user profile

tu_*.description: TransUnion TruAudience cookie linking credit bureau consumer data to digital advertising identifiers for identity resolution

uid.description: Adform cross-device identifier cookie for linking multiple devices to a single advertising profile

uid2_*.description: UID 2.0 encrypted email-based identifier for post-cookie cross-site ad tracking — converts email addresses into persistent advertising IDs

utiq_*.description: Utiq European telco consent cookie using network-level identity for authenticated advertising

wallet_connected_*.description: Web3 dApp cookie recording connected wallet addresses for persistent user identification across sessions

web3_session_*.description: Web3 application session cookie linking wallet signatures to browser fingerprint for identity persistence

zeotap_uid.description: Zeotap deterministic identity resolution cookie linking device signals to individual user profiles

accessibe.com/fingerprint.note: accessiBe accessibility overlay fingerprinting — collects device and browser characteristics under the guise of accessibility adaptation, creating persistent device fingerprints. Disability rights advocates have widely criticized this practice.

acr.lgads.tv.note: LG Smart TV automatic content recognition — monitors and fingerprints content displayed on LG webOS TVs for viewer profiling and cross-device ad targeting

acr.samsungads.com.note: Samsung Smart TV automatic content recognition — fingerprints TV content for viewer profiling and ad targeting across Samsung's 50M+ connected TVs

aggregationservice.googleapis.com.note: Private Aggregation API — aggregation service for Privacy Sandbox APIs, enables noisy aggregate measurement of cross-site data without individual user tracking

alchemy.com.note: Alchemy RPC infrastructure — alternative to Infura; receives all wallet queries and transaction data from connected dApps

api.chainalysis.com/identity.note: Chainalysis Know Your Transaction — government blockchain surveillance tool linking cryptocurrency wallet addresses to real-world identities. Used by IRS, FBI, HMRC, and law enforcement in 60+ countries.

api.getambassador.com/fingerprint.note: Aggressive browser fingerprinting — collects canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, screen, fonts, plugins, and hardware data without explicit consent

api.metamask.io.note: MetaMask wallet API — sends wallet addresses, token balances, and transaction data to Consensys infrastructure

api.nansen.ai/labels.note: Nansen wallet labeling — identifies and de-anonymizes cryptocurrency wallet owners by linking on-chain activity patterns to known entities

api.permutive.com.note: Permutive edge-based DMP using first-party data and device signals for audience targeting

api.phantom.app.note: Phantom Solana wallet API — sends wallet addresses, token queries, and transaction data to Phantom servers

api.trustwallet.com.note: Trust Wallet API (Binance-owned) — wallet addresses and transaction data sent to Binance infrastructure

attribution-reporting.googleapis.com.note: Attribution Reporting API — enables cross-site ad conversion measurement without third-party cookies by using browser-mediated attribution with noise and aggregation

auction.googleapis.com.note: Protected Audience (formerly FLEDGE) — moves ad auction logic into the browser, creating interest groups based on browsing behavior for on-device retargeting without cookies

brave.com/privacy-sandbox.note: Brave browser privacy-preserving ad system — matches ads locally on-device using browsing history without sending data to external servers

cdn.51degrees.com.note: High-accuracy device detection — identifies device properties from HTTP headers using a database of 250M+ device combinations for fingerprint-based identification

cdn.adform.net.note: European ad tech platform — combines device fingerprinting with cross-device identity resolution for programmatic advertising

cdn.adnuntius.com.note: Scandinavian ad server — uses first-party data and device signals for cookieless ad targeting in Nordic markets

cdn.augur.io.note: AI-powered device fingerprinting — uses machine learning to link anonymous devices to real identities, building cross-device identity graphs from browser fingerprints and behavioral patterns

cdn.botd.io.note: Made by FingerprintJS — open-source bot detection that collects browser fingerprint signals (canvas, WebGL, audio, fonts) identical to tracking fingerprints. Dual-use: blocks bots while enabling user identification.

cdn.browscap.org.note: Open-source browser detection database — maps User-Agent strings to browser and device capabilities for server-side fingerprinting

cdn.clientjs.org.note: Open-source browser fingerprinting library — collects screen resolution, timezone, plugins, fonts, canvas, WebGL, and AudioContext to generate unique device fingerprints. Widely used for stateless tracking.

cdn.connectid.yahoo.com.note: Yahoo post-cookie identity — uses hashed email addresses from Yahoo Mail's 225M+ users to enable cross-site advertising tracking via deterministic identity matching

cdn.cookielaw.org/scripttemplates.note: OneTrust consent verification may use device fingerprinting for consent fraud prevention

cdn.creativecdn.com.note: RTB House deep learning retargeting — uses AI-powered device and behavioral fingerprinting for ad personalization without traditional cookies

cdn.creativecdn.com/tags.note: RTB House uses deep learning AI for cookieless retargeting by analyzing browsing behavior patterns for user identification without traditional tracking

cdn.debank.com.note: Web3 social portfolio platform — tracks wallet addresses, DeFi positions, and NFT holdings to build public financial profiles. Makes crypto wealth transparent and trackable.

cdn.deviceatlas.com.note: Server-side device detection library — identifies device type, browser, OS from User-Agent and Client Hints for content adaptation, also enabling device-level fingerprinting

cdn.euid.eu.note: European version of UID 2.0 — same cross-site tracking via hashed emails but designed to comply with GDPR. Still enables the same surveillance advertising model in European markets.

cdn.evercookie.com.note: Zombie cookie library — stores identifiers in 10+ browser storage mechanisms to resist deletion

cdn.experian.com/marketing.note: Credit bureau identity resolution — uses credit file data on 245M+ US consumers to power digital advertising targeting. Your credit bureau data is being used to serve you ads.

cdn.foundation.app.note: NFT marketplace — links wallet addresses to browsing behavior, bid history, and social profiles, creating identity profiles from supposedly pseudonymous crypto activity

cdn.heapanalytics.com/fingerprint.note: Heap auto-captures all user interactions including device fingerprint signals for session stitching

cdn.imprintjs.com.note: Device fingerprinting library — generates unique browser fingerprints from hardware and software characteristics, designed to survive cookie deletion and private browsing

cdn.inscape.tv.note: Vizio Inscape automatic content recognition — fingerprints audio/video content displayed on TV screens every second, creating a detailed viewing profile. FTC fined Vizio $2.2M for collecting this data without consent.

cdn.ipaddressguide.com/fingerprint.note: IP-based fingerprinting service — combines IP geolocation with browser characteristics for cookieless user identification

cdn.iponweb.com.note: BidSwitch — cookie matching and identity resolution platform connecting 300+ demand and supply partners for cross-platform ad targeting

cdn.krxd.net.note: Cross-device fingerprinting and identity resolution for Salesforce Data Management Platform

cdn.lotame.com.note: Lotame DMP using Panorama ID for people-based identity across devices and browsers

cdn.netid.de.note: European single sign-on identity — backed by RTL, ProSiebenSat.1, and Mediengruppe. Creates cross-site identity through login, enabling persistent tracking across participating European media sites.

cdn.optable.co/identity.note: Optable privacy-first data collaboration — uses encrypted identity matching for audience activation across publishers without sharing raw data

cdn.panoramaid.lotame.com.note: Lotame's post-cookie identity solution — uses probabilistic matching and machine learning to link identifiers across devices and browsers without traditional cookies. Claims privacy but enables cross-site tracking.

cdn.rainbowkit.com.note: Web3 wallet connection kit — detects and fingerprints installed cryptocurrency wallets by probing browser APIs, revealing user's crypto wallet ecosystem and financial tool preferences

cdn.rampid.liveramp.com.note: LiveRamp's core identity product — converts PII (email, phone, address) into a deterministic identifier used for cross-device ad targeting across 500+ platforms. The backbone of post-cookie surveillance.

cdn.rarible.com.note: NFT marketplace — tracks wallet addresses, transaction history, and browsing behavior across NFT collections. Links on-chain identity to web browsing patterns.

cdn.seedtag.com.note: European contextual advertising — uses computer vision AI to analyze page content and combines with device signals for cookieless ad targeting

cdn.superrare.com.note: Art NFT marketplace — tracks wallet activity, collection browsing, and bidding patterns. Links on-chain financial behavior to web browsing identity.

cdn.throtle.io.note: Deterministic identity resolution — matches offline PII (names, addresses, emails) to online identifiers and device IDs, building persistent cross-device identity graphs from consumer data

cdn.uidapi.com.note: Post-cookie identity framework — converts email addresses into encrypted identifiers for cross-site ad tracking. Marketed as privacy-preserving but still enables persistent cross-site user tracking.

cdn.verisk.com/marketing.note: Insurance data company turned identity provider — uses insurance and financial data on 330M+ consumers for identity resolution and audience targeting in advertising

cdn.wagmi.sh.note: React hooks library for Ethereum — detects installed wallet providers and chain configurations, creating a crypto-financial fingerprint of the user's Web3 setup

cdn.web3modal.com.note: Web3 wallet connection library — probes for installed cryptocurrency wallets (MetaMask, Coinbase, Trust) by checking window.ethereum and other provider objects, fingerprinting which wallets users have installed

cdn.zapper.xyz.note: DeFi portfolio tracker — monitors wallet balances, transaction history, and DeFi positions across chains. Creates comprehensive financial profiles from blockchain data linked to web sessions.

cdn.zerion.io.note: DeFi portfolio manager — monitors wallet transactions, token balances, and protocol interactions across multiple chains, building comprehensive financial profiles

challenge.okx.com.note: OKX exchange challenge endpoint using device fingerprinting for account security verification

collector.gemini.com.note: Gemini exchange device data collector for regulatory compliance and fraud detection fingerprinting

device.binance.com.note: Binance device fingerprinting endpoint for exchange security and cross-device identity verification

edge.privacy.microsoft.com.note: Microsoft Edge browser privacy API endpoints for ad selection, conversion measurement, and cross-site tracking alternatives

fabrick.neustar.biz.note: Neustar Fabrick identity graph linking online identifiers to offline consumer records for people-based targeting

fencedframes.googleapis.com.note: Fenced Frames — isolated rendering context for ads that prevents the embedding site from accessing the ad's network data, but still enables cross-site ad serving

id.roku.com.note: Roku identity resolution — links Roku device IDs to household identity for cross-screen ad targeting using ACR data from 80M+ active accounts

identity.transunion.com.note: Credit bureau turned identity graph — TruAudience links consumer credit file data with online identifiers, cookies, and device IDs to enable identity resolution using financial data

identity.xandr.com.note: Microsoft Xandr identity resolution — links AppNexus user IDs across publishers for cross-site advertising

idgraph.oracle.com.note: Oracle cross-device identity graph — links devices, browsers, and identifiers across billions of data points from Oracle Data Cloud, BlueKai, and AddThis to build persistent identity profiles

infura.io.note: MetaMask default RPC endpoint — every wallet balance check, token query, and transaction sends user IP and wallet address to Consensys (Infura) servers. De-anonymizes crypto users at the infrastructure level.

ipa.apple.com.note: Apple Private Click Measurement — Safari's privacy-preserving ad attribution API with limited cross-site data, alternative to Google's Attribution Reporting

liveintent.com/idex.note: LiveIntent Identity Exchange — matches email addresses across 250M+ newsletters to create deterministic identity graph for cookieless ad targeting

liveramp.com.note: LiveRamp connects offline and online data using deterministic identity matching

match.prod.bidr.io.note: Comcast-owned DSP with cookie matching — synchronizes user identities across Comcast's advertising ecosystem including FreeWheel and NBCUniversal

nonid.liveintent.com.note: LiveIntent non-ID resolution — cookieless identity matching using email engagement signals and device fingerprinting

novatiq.com.note: Novatiq telco-verified identity platform for cookieless audience identification

parakeet.azurewebsites.net.note: Microsoft PARAKEET proposal — alternative to Google's Privacy Sandbox using a proxy-based approach where Microsoft intermediates between advertisers and users

privacysandbox.googleapis.com.note: Google Privacy Sandbox central endpoint — coordinates Topics API, Attribution Reporting, Protected Audience, and other post-cookie tracking APIs that replace third-party cookies with browser-mediated surveillance

reactor.chainalysis.com.note: Chainalysis Reactor investigation tool — clusters wallet addresses, maps transaction flows, and links blockchain activity to real-world entities for law enforcement

retargetly.com.note: Latin American data management platform for audience profiling across regional markets

sdk.privacy-center.org.note: IAB Global Privacy Platform — standardizes consent signals but also enables identity resolution through consent-based tracking frameworks

security.kraken.com.note: Kraken exchange device verification endpoint using browser fingerprinting for account security

sharedid.org.note: Prebid SharedID provides first-party identity for header bidding across publishers

sharedstorageapi.googleapis.com.note: Shared Storage API — allows cross-site data storage in the browser without direct site access, enabling frequency capping, A/B testing, and creative rotation across sites

swap.api.cx.metamask.io.note: MetaMask swap aggregator — collects swap quotes, wallet addresses, and token amounts for DEX routing

tags.bluekai.com.note: Oracle BlueKai data management platform creating cross-device audience profiles

topics.googleapis.com.note: Topics API — replaces FLoC by categorizing users into interest-based topics from browsing history. Sites can query browsing-topics header to learn visitor interests without cookies.

tracking.1plusx.com.note: 1plusX first-party data platform using predictive modeling for audience ID resolution

userpilot.com.note: Product adoption platform that fingerprints users for cross-session identification

utiq.com.note: Utiq (European telco consortium) authenticated consent signal using network-level identity

wurfl.io.note: Wireless Universal Resource FiLe — industry-standard device fingerprinting database. Identifies 60,000+ device types from HTTP headers for content optimization and ad targeting.

zeotap.com.note: Zeotap deterministic identity resolution platform linking devices to individual profiles
